who: law firm accountants processing 5–15 trust account reconciliations/month
offer: For law firm accountants processing 5–15 trust account reconciliations/month, manual reconciliation causes significant time loss and potential errors. We streamline the reconciliation process instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem: Manual reconciliation processes are time-consuming and prone to errors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for law firm accountants

DM outreach to law firm accountants with demo video
Community forums for sharing accounting tools
try_it: Let users try error reporting and summary generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Short demo video of manual workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
